content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Lecture Sleep". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/961/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of students. The second line contains n integers, representing the time when each student falls asleep.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of students that can be woken up.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the times of falling asleep and wake up the students in the order they fall asleep.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
count = 1
for i in range(1, n):
    if arr[i] > arr[i-1]:
        count += 1
print(count)
